# hush_grok_access_credential (Data Source)

Use this data source to retrieve information about a Grok access credential in the Hush Security platform.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "hush_grok_access_credential" "example" {
  id = "acr-eu12345678"
}

output "name" {
  value = data.hush_grok_access_credential.example.name
}

output "team_id" {
  value = data.hush_grok_access_credential.example.team_id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the Grok access credential

### Read-Only

- `deployment_ids` (List of String) List of deployment IDs that can access this credential
- `description` (String) The description of the Grok access credential
- `kind` (String) The kind of access credential
- `name` (String) The name of the Grok access credential
- `team_id` (String) The Grok team ID
- `type` (String) The type of access credential
